title: Aurora, 60957, Sparkle Tales, Frosty Unicorn, 12In, Soft Toy, White and Blue
features: From Aurora's highly popular Sparkle Tales Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Gorgous Sparkle accent materials, with glitter eyes
Children will love this cute, colourful and hugely collectable character
description: Product Description The Sparkle Tales Kingdom is a fantasy world where all kinds of magical creatures live. It is a place where fairy tales and imaginations are free to roam. The Sparkle Tales World consists of forests, desert, sea and a magical castle. Frosty Unicorn lives in the Mirror Valley within the Sparkle Tales Kingdom with the other Sparkle Tales creatures. Frosty the Unicorn has a beautiful white body and blue mane which is super-soft and perfect for cuddles. She has sparkly blue hooves and ears which compliments her beautiful sparkly eyes. Frosty loves hanging out with her friends throughout the Sparkle Tales Kingdom. Collect them all. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Box Contains Item
